fields.description:
We are seeking a passionate and motivated Full-Stack Developer with 0-3 years of experience. As a part of our team, you will be responsible for developing, testing, and deploying web and mobile applications. You will work closely with our senior developers to design, develop, and implement projects, and bring innovative solutions to enhance our product
Key Responsibilities
Develop, test, and maintain scalable web and mobile applications.
Develop backend logic and database structures using Node.js or Python or Laravel
Work with front-end technologies like ReactJs, Flutter, React Native, NextJs
Design, implement, and optimize MongoDB/MySQL databases.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure high-quality product delivery.
Troubleshoot, debug, and upgrade existing applications.
Document development processes, code changes, and project updates.
Participate in code reviews and contribute to improving development standards.
Skills and Qualifications
Required Skills:
Proficiency in JavaScript , Python.or Php
Knowledge of HTML/CSS for responsive UI development.
Familiarity with MongoDB or MySQL databases.
Experience or familiarity with React Native or Flutter for mobile development.
Must be quick learner with a proactive, self-driven approach to tasks.
Must demonstrate problem-solving skills and a commitment to continuous learning.
Effective communicator with a team-oriented mindset.
Preferred Skills:
Understanding of Node.js/Python/Php and backend development.
Good understanding of database and database query is must
Experience with frontend frameworks like React, Flutter and React Native.
Basic knowledge of RESTful APIs and how to integrate them into applications.
Ability to work in an Agile environment.
Candidate Profile
Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.
Demonstrated interest in full-stack development through projects, internships, or course work.
Strong problem-solving skills and eagerness to learn new technologies.
Effective communication skills and ability to work collaboratively in a team environment


Role: Full Stack Developer
Industry Type: IT Services & Consulting
Department: Engineering - Software & QA
Employment Type: Full Time, Permanent
Role Category: Software Development
Education
UG: B.Tech/B.E. - Bachelor of Technology / Engineering in Any Specialization, BCA - Bachelor of Computer Applications in Any Specialization
PG: MCA in Any Specialization, M.Tech in Any Specialization

Job Title - Salesforce Developer
Location - Noida
Experience -5-10 Years
Mode of Interview - Face to face
Date of interview:- 21st March 2026

Job Description :
Design and build detailed technical cloud CRM solutions
Design and develop sophisticated customizations using Salesforce and Force.com
Lead the day-to-day work of our Salesforce technical team, onshore and offshore
Use the Salesforce platform, security, single sign-on, and other tools to build end-to-end solutions
Education: BS in Computer Science or similar is required.
Expertise in Apex, LWC, AURA lightning components, Visual force, Web Services, SOQL, SAQL, SASL, AJAX, XML, JavaScript and HTML
Salesforce Developer, Admin and Sales or Service Cloud Certification.
Must possess extensive knowledge and expertise with Salesforce and in the use of project
Proficient skills using Salesforce Application Development
Proficient skills using Applications Development
Proficient skills using Salesforce Reporting Service
Proficient skills using Web Services for Integration
A proven ability in technology implementation for full life cycle enterprise software projects for 5 to 10 years
A minimum of 2 years' experience developing Salesforce customizations (Apex/VF) and integrations, and defining and implementing data migrations
A minimum of 1 year experience with customization on the Salesforce Lightning platform including Lightning components using the Lightning Design System framework, Apex, Apex data loader, and declarative platform tools (process Builder, Visual Workflow, Lightning App Builder, etc.)
A minimum of 2 years' experience leading projects, technical project teams, and performing code reviews


Role: Other
Industry Type: IT Services & Consulting
Department: Other
Employment Type: Full Time, Permanent
Role Category: Other
Education
UG: Any Graduate
